rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §34.010, which governs school bus use for extracurricular activities. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 34.010. USE OF SCHOOL BUSES FOR EXTRACURRICULAR AND OTHER SCHOOL-RELATED ACTIVITIES.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed change; no conflict identified.
